'''chozazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labiomental|labiomental]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labiomental|labiomental]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chozazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozazhithi|chozazhithi]] || [[word:chozazhiji|chozazhiji]] || [[word:chozazhishi|chozazhishi]] || [[word:chozazhiki|chozazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozazhuthuthu|chozazhuthuthu]] || [[word:chozazhujuju|chozazhujuju]] || [[word:chozazhushushu|chozazhushushu]] || [[word:chozazhukuku|chozazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozazhuthu|chozazhuthu]] || [[word:chozazhuju|chozazhuju]] || [[word:chozazhushu|chozazhushu]] || [[word:chozazhuku|chozazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozazhufthuf|chozazhufthuf]] || [[word:chozazhufjuf|chozazhufjuf]] || [[word:chozazhufshuf|chozazhufshuf]] || [[word:chozazhufkuf|chozazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozazhethe|chozazhethe]] || [[word:chozazheje|chozazheje]] || [[word:chozazheshe|chozazheshe]] || [[word:chozazheke|chozazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozazhothotho|chozazhothotho]] || [[word:chozazhojojo|chozazhojojo]] || [[word:chozazhoshosho|chozazhoshosho]] || [[word:chozazhokoko|chozazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozazhotho|chozazhotho]] || [[word:chozazhojo|chozazhojo]] || [[word:chozazhosho|chozazhosho]] || [[word:chozazhoko|chozazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozazhofthof|chozazhofthof]] || [[word:chozazhofjof|chozazhofjof]] || [[word:chozazhofshof|chozazhofshof]] || [[word:chozazhofkof|chozazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfthĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfjĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfshĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfkĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfthĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfjĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfshĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfkĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfthĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfjĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfshĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozazhĂŻfkĂŻf|chozazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozazhĂŠthĂŠ|chozazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chozazhĂŠjĂŠ|chozazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chozazhĂŠshĂŠ|chozazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chozazhĂŠkĂŠ|chozazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozazhathatha|chozazhathatha]] || [[word:chozazhajaja|chozazhajaja]] || [[word:chozazhashasha|chozazhashasha]] || [[word:chozazhakaka|chozazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozazhatha|chozazhatha]] || [[word:chozazhaja|chozazhaja]] || [[word:chozazhasha|chozazhasha]] || [[word:chozazhaka|chozazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozazhafthaf|chozazhafthaf]] || [[word:chozazhafjaf|chozazhafjaf]] || [[word:chozazhafshaf|chozazhafshaf]] || [[word:chozazhafkaf|chozazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chozazhasha|chozazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozazhshĂ«sha|chozazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozazhrosha|chozazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozazhmusha|chozazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozazhyasha|chozazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozazhnkshĂ«sha|gochozazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozazhnkrosha|gochozazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozazhnkmusha|gochozazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozazhnkyasha|gochozazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chozazazhasha|chozazazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozazazhshĂ«sha|chozazazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozazazhrosha|chozazazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozazazhmusha|chozazazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozazazhyasha|chozazazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozazazhnkshĂ«sha|gochozazazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozazazhnkrosha|gochozazazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozazazhnkmusha|gochozazazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozazazhnkyasha|gochozazazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chezĂŠzhasha|chezĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chezĂŠzhshĂ«sha|chezĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chezĂŠzhrosha|chezĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chezĂŠzhmusha|chezĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chezĂŠzhyasha|chezĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochezĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|gochezĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochezĂŠzhnkrosha|gochezĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochezĂŠzhnkmusha|gochezĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochezĂŠzhnkyasha|gochezĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chozfazhasha|chozfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozfazhshĂ«sha|chozfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozfazhrosha|chozfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozfazhmusha|chozfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozfazhyasha|chozfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozfazhnkshĂ«sha|gochozfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozfazhnkrosha|gochozfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozfazhnkmusha|gochozfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozfazhnkyasha|gochozfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
